entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed, also known as witch weed, that causes significant yield losses in sorghum production.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species Sorghum bicolor evaluated for resistance to Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country, specifically the Northern region, where the study was conducted.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of sorghum accessions.

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist infestation by Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: INFESTATION
entities.description: The state of being invaded by Striga hermonthica, leading to yield loss.

entities.name: GENETIC COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION
entities.description: A statistical measure used to estimate genetic variation in the population.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of observed variation in a trait that is due to genetic factors.

entities.name: GENETIC ADVANCE
entities.description: The expected improvement in a trait resulting from selection.

entities.name: ASUNPC
entities.description: Area under Striga number progress curve, a metric used to assess resistance.

entities.name: STRIGA EMERGENCE COUNTS
entities.description: The counting of emerged Striga plants to evaluate resistance levels.

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of identifying and breeding superior genotypes for resistance.

entities.name: SRN39
entities.description: A sorghum accession identified as highly resistant to Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: DANYANA
entities.description: A sorghum accession identified as highly resistant to Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: SEPON82
entities.description: A sorghum accession identified as highly resistant to Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: SAMSORG40
entities.description: A sorghum accession identified as highly resistant to Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: RESISTANT GENES
entities.description: Genes providing resistance to Striga hermonthica.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The process of transferring resistant genes into adapted cultivars.

entities.name: RECOMBINATION BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach used to combine different resistance mechanisms.

entities.name: PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The technique of combining multiple resistance genes into a single genotype.

entities.name: RESISTANCE MECHANISMS
entities.description: The biological processes that enable a plant to resist a parasite.
